title: Set up CI/CD pipeline for the project
subtasks: Choose a CI/CD platform (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.)
Write a build and test workflow configuration file
Configure deployment to staging environment
Add status badges to the README

title: Design database schema for user profiles
subtasks: List all required user profile fields
Create an ER diagram for the schema
Write the SQL migration file
Add seed data for testing

title: Write unit tests for the auth module
subtasks: Test login with valid credentials
Test login with invalid password
Test token refresh flow
Test account lockout after failed attempts
Test password reset email dispatch

title: Complete a claude project
subtasks: Clearly define the project's objective, target audience, and success criteria.
Craft an initial detailed prompt for Claude and outline the interaction strategy.
Generate and refine project outputs through multiple iterations with Claude.
Conduct a final review of all outputs against defined criteria and prepare for delivery.

title: Create a MCP
subtasks: Define the core problem, target user, and primary goal for the MCP.
Identify and prioritize the absolute minimum features required to achieve the goal.
Design a simple user flow and create a low-fidelity prototype or mock-up.
Outline the plan for building, testing, and gathering initial feedback on the MCP.

title: i have done my project
subtasks: Conduct final quality assurance and fix any remaining bugs.
Complete or update all necessary project documentation.
Package and prepare all project deliverables for submission.
Notify relevant stakeholders of project completion and availability.
